pullRequest.title: [DOM-55092]  DSP restarts the workspace with EDV tests

nodes.body: I think `output_file_path = "/mnt/response.txt"` could be placed outside the function since it is used twice with the same value on lines 11 and 21.

Super nit:
```suggestion
  Scenario: DSP Restarts the Workspace session after EDV is updated
```

Nit:
```suggestion
  Scenario: DSP Restarts the Workspace session after EDV is unregistered
```

It might be useful for debugging if the print statement had a title like
```suggestion
    print("Update EDV Response:\n", response.content)
```
